title: Undergarden Paths
description: Just a small mod that adds paths for Undergarden's Deepturf and its variants!
body:
![Frozen Deepturf, Deepturf, and Ashen Deepturf paths displayed in order from left to right in an isometric view](https://github.com/Xaidee/Undergarden-Paths/blob/1.18.x/src/main/resources/Undergarden%20Paths.png?raw=true)
# Undergarden Paths 

Just a small mod that adds paths for Undergarden's Deepturf and its variants!

Having paths in the base mod doesn't fit the Undergarden developers vision so I made this addon for those who want to discard said vision.

This mod is intended for those who want to make their modpacks feel more complete, especially when combined with other mods that add path variants to vanillas blocks, such as Infernal Expansion's Nylium Paths, and Environmental's Mycelium and Podzol paths.
